ocr.text: In evaluating the operational efficiency of our fulfillment strategy, it is imperative to analyze the Fulfillment Cost per Order
data, which provides insights into our performance metrics throughout 2024. As illustrated in the accompanying table, we
observe a steady increase in our total orders, which reached an impressive figure by the end of Q4 2024. Notably, Operational
Efficiency's Q2 2024 metric was recorded at 12.5%, indicating a significant enhancement in our processes compared to
previous quarters. Moreover, Customer Satisfaction levels in Q2 2024 were reported at 90.0%, reflecting the successful
implementation of customer-centric initiatives.

By Q3 2024, this figure rose to an outstanding 91.5%, demonstrating our commitment to improving customer experience. The
Average Cost percentage associated with Customer Satisfaction was recorded at 0.4%, highlighting the cost-effectiveness of our
fulfillment operations. Additionally, as we evaluate our shipping strategies, the figures show that Domestic Shipping in Q2 2024
accounted for 5.2M, while the International Shipping total for 2023 Actual stood at 15.6M. When compared to our competitors,
such as CompetitorA, our handling fees in Q1 2024 were categorized under HandlingFees, showcasing our competitive
positioning in the market. Furthermore, the Packaging Costs metric for Q3 2024 was determined to be 6.5, underscoring our
ongoing efforts to optimize operational expenses. This comprehensive analysis equips us with the necessary data to refine our
strategies and enhance performance across our fulfillment channels.
